creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 156676
svn diff to fix audio/snd

I use this port a great deal. When I got the message it was marked
broken for the source being Unfetchable. I set out to attempt to
fix the problem. Turns out, this port version is quite old. So I
had to go to Sourceforge to get the version to satisfy it.

Given the current version is now at: 15.6. I'll be looking to
bring this port up to date.

Anyway, all this submission does, is satisfy it's need to
obtain the source -- changes MASTER_SITES to Sourceforge.

Feel free to add me as maintainer, if need be.

That's it.

Thanks!

--Chris
